short_description: SAP MM transaction MIGO extremely slow
detailed_description: Users report MIGO transaction taking over 60 seconds to load during goods receipt posting. Buffer pool exhausted.
root_cause: Database buffer pool overflow due to large batch posting without index optimization
remediation_steps: 1. Check ST02 buffer statistics 2. Increase buffer pool size in RZ10 3. Rebuild indexes on MSEG table 4. Schedule batch postings off-peak

short_description: FI posting period not open for January
detailed_description: Users cannot post financial documents in January. Posting period configuration missing for new fiscal year.
root_cause: Posting period variant not maintained for new fiscal year in OB52
remediation_steps: 1. Open transaction OB52 2. Maintain posting period for period 01/2026 3. Verify authorization group 4. Test with FB01

short_description: SD pricing condition not calculating correctly
detailed_description: Sales orders showing incorrect pricing for material group Z001. Condition type PR00 returning zero.
root_cause: Validity period expired on pricing condition record in VK11
remediation_steps: 1. Check VK13 for condition records 2. Extend validity dates in VK11 3. Regenerate pricing in VA02 4. Verify with billing simulation

short_description: Oracle AP invoice interface failing with ORA-00001
detailed_description: Invoice import program APXIIMPT failing with unique constraint violation. 500+ invoices stuck in interface.
root_cause: Duplicate invoice numbers in AP_INVOICES_INTERFACE table from upstream feed
remediation_steps: 1. Query interface table for duplicates 2. Purge duplicate records 3. Fix source system duplicate check 4. Rerun APXIIMPT import program

short_description: MRP run taking over 12 hours to complete
detailed_description: Weekly MRP run MD01 exceeding maintenance window. System resources maxed during execution.
root_cause: Missing indexes on planning tables and excessive MRP scope without proper plant/MRP area filters
remediation_steps: 1. Review MD01 scope parameters 2. Add indexes on MDKP/MDTB tables 3. Enable parallel processing in OMIX 4. Segment MRP by plant groups

short_description: Users locked out after password policy change
detailed_description: Multiple users unable to login after security policy update. SUIM showing locked accounts.
root_cause: New password policy parameters in SECPOL not communicated to user base
remediation_steps: 1. Review locked users in SU10 2. Mass unlock via SU10 3. Communicate new password requirements 4. Monitor login failures in SM20

short_description: Oracle GL journal import rejecting entries
detailed_description: AutoPost program failing with period not open error. Month-end close journals stuck.
root_cause: GL period status not set to Open for January in GL_PERIOD_STATUSES
remediation_steps: 1. Open GL period via Navigate > Setup > Open/Close 2. Verify subledger periods 3. Resubmit journal import 4. Validate with trial balance

short_description: Warehouse management RF transactions timeout
detailed_description: RF scanner transactions in LT01/LT02 timing out. Warehouse operations halted.
root_cause: Network latency combined with large open transfer order volume in LTBK table
remediation_steps: 1. Archive completed transfer orders 2. Check network latency to RF devices 3. Optimize LTBK table indexes 4. Increase dialog work process timeout

short_description: Asset depreciation run posting to wrong cost center
detailed_description: AFAB depreciation run posting to old cost center after reorganization. Financial reports incorrect.
root_cause: Cost center assignment in asset master not updated after org restructuring
remediation_steps: 1. Run AR02 to check asset master 2. Mass update cost centers via ABUMN 3. Reverse incorrect postings 4. Rerun AFAB for affected assets

short_description: Oracle Inventory min-max planning not generating orders
detailed_description: Min-max planning report not creating requisitions. Stock levels falling below safety stock.
root_cause: Item planning method not set to Min-Max in item master organization parameters
remediation_steps: 1. Check item attributes in Item Master 2. Set planning method to Min-Max 3. Define min/max quantities 4. Rerun min-max planning report

short_description: SAP HANA memory alert - MM tables consuming excessive memory
detailed_description: HANA memory utilization at 92%. MSEG and MKPF tables consuming majority of column store memory.
root_cause: Historical data not archived. Table partitioning not optimized for HANA.
remediation_steps: 1. Check HANA Studio memory overview 2. Archive MSEG/MKPF older than 2 years via SARA 3. Optimize table partitioning 4. Monitor memory recovery

short_description: Delivery document creation failing with partner error
detailed_description: VL01N failing with partner function SP not determined. Orders stuck without deliveries.
root_cause: Ship-to party partner function removed during customer master data cleanup
remediation_steps: 1. Check customer master XD03 partner functions 2. Restore SP partner function 3. Process stuck deliveries via VL04 4. Add partner function validation to cleanup procedures

short_description: Background job queue backlog exceeding threshold
detailed_description: Over 200 background jobs in queue. BTCTRNS1 showing Released status with no available background work processes.
root_cause: Background work processes consumed by long-running reports without time limits
remediation_steps: 1. Check SM37 for long-running jobs 2. Cancel stuck jobs after review 3. Increase BGD work processes in RZ04 4. Implement job scheduling governance

short_description: Purchase order approval workflow stuck in AME
detailed_description: Purchase orders pending approval for 3+ days. AME rules not routing to backup approvers.
root_cause: Approval hierarchy missing backup approver for terminated manager in HR_ALL_POSITIONS
remediation_steps: 1. Check AME rule configuration 2. Update approval hierarchy 3. Reassign pending approvals 4. Add vacancy detection rule to AME

short_description: Bank statement import BFF failing with format error
detailed_description: Electronic bank statement import via FF_5 failing. Bank reconciliation delayed.
root_cause: Bank communication format changed by bank without prior notification
remediation_steps: 1. Compare old and new bank formats 2. Update FIBF configuration 3. Adjust BAI2/MT940 mapping in SPRO 4. Test with sample statement

short_description: Purchase requisition approval workflow not triggering
detailed_description: PR created via ME51N not routing to approvers. SWI1 showing no workflow events.
root_cause: Release strategy condition records not maintained for new purchasing group
remediation_steps: 1. Check release strategy in SPRO 2. Maintain condition records for new purch group 3. Test workflow via SWDD 4. Verify approver assignments in SWI1

short_description: Oracle AR AutoInvoice failing with tax calculation error
detailed_description: AutoInvoice import rejecting records with tax error. Revenue recognition delayed.
root_cause: Tax rate code expired in ZX_RATES table for January effective dates
remediation_steps: 1. Check tax configuration in eBTax 2. Extend rate effective dates 3. Revalidate interface records 4. Resubmit AutoInvoice

short_description: SAP system response time degraded across all modules
detailed_description: Average dialog response time exceeding 3 seconds. All transactions affected.
root_cause: Excessive table statistics causing optimizer to choose suboptimal execution plans
remediation_steps: 1. Update table statistics via DB13 2. Reset buffer pools 3. Check expensive SQL in ST04 4. Review and tune top 10 queries

short_description: Output determination not generating invoice printouts
detailed_description: Billing documents created but no output generated. Customers not receiving invoices.
root_cause: Output condition records missing for new billing type in NACE
remediation_steps: 1. Check NACE output configuration 2. Create condition records in VV31 3. Manually trigger output for pending invoices 4. Verify printer/email settings

short_description: Goods receipt posting creating duplicate material documents
detailed_description: MIGO posting creating two material documents for single receipt. Inventory quantities doubled.
root_cause: Double-click on save button combined with missing idempotency check in custom BADI
remediation_steps: 1. Identify affected material docs via MB51 2. Reverse duplicates via MBST 3. Implement click-lock in BADI 4. Add duplicate detection logic

short_description: SAP transaction ME2M report running for 45 minutes
detailed_description: Purchase order report ME2M timing out for large date ranges. Procurement team blocked.
root_cause: Missing index on EKKO/EKPO for document date range queries
remediation_steps: 1. Analyze execution plan in ST05 2. Create composite index on EKKO(BEDAT+BUKRS) 3. Consider ALV list vs grid optimization 4. Implement date range restrictions

short_description: Oracle Fixed Assets depreciation projection report error
detailed_description: Depreciation projection showing negative values. Capital planning affected.
root_cause: Salvage value incorrectly set higher than asset cost for recently transferred assets
remediation_steps: 1. Query FA_BOOKS for salvage > cost 2. Correct salvage values 3. Run what-if depreciation 4. Resubmit projection report

short_description: Financial report authorization missing for new cost centers
detailed_description: Users cannot run FBL3N for new cost centers. Authorization check failing on K_BKPF.
root_cause: Authorization profile not updated for new cost center groups in PFCG
remediation_steps: 1. Check SU53 authorization failures 2. Update role in PFCG 3. Add new cost center groups 4. Transport and assign updated role

short_description: Intercompany billing process generating incorrect tax
detailed_description: VF01 intercompany invoice showing domestic tax instead of zero-rated for cross-border
root_cause: Tax condition records not maintained for intercompany customer/plant combination
remediation_steps: 1. Review FTXP tax code configuration 2. Create intercompany tax condition records 3. Rebill affected intercompany invoices 4. Add intercompany tax validation

short_description: SAP system crash due to extended memory exhaustion
detailed_description: System dump with TSV_TNEW_PAGE_ALLOC_FAILED. Multiple users disconnected.
root_cause: Memory leak in custom ABAP program running as periodic background job
remediation_steps: 1. Analyze ST22 dumps 2. Identify leaking program via SM04 3. Fix internal table memory handling 4. Increase ztta/roll_extension parameter

short_description: Oracle cycle count not generating count requests
detailed_description: Cycle count entries not appearing in physical inventory. ABC analysis not running.
root_cause: Cycle count header not enabled for automatic scheduling in MTL_CYCLE_COUNT_HEADERS
remediation_steps: 1. Enable auto-schedule in cycle count header 2. Define ABC classes and item assignments 3. Run ABC compilation 4. Generate count requests

short_description: Material master search help extremely slow in MM01
detailed_description: F4 search help on material number taking 30+ seconds. Users frustrated.
root_cause: Search help program performing full table scan on MARA without proper selection criteria
remediation_steps: 1. Analyze search help in SE11 2. Add collective search help with prioritized elementary helps 3. Implement max hit restrictions 4. Consider creating custom search help

short_description: Payment run F110 failing with bank determination error
detailed_description: Automatic payment run aborting. Vendor payments delayed past due dates.
root_cause: House bank configuration changed during maintenance without updating payment method supplements
remediation_steps: 1. Check FBZP payment method configuration 2. Restore house bank assignment 3. Verify bank determination rules 4. Restart F110 payment run

short_description: Sales order report VA05 slow for large date ranges
detailed_description: VA05 taking over 20 minutes for monthly reports. Sales team productivity impacted.
root_cause: Non-optimized custom report variant loading all fields including pricing conditions
remediation_steps: 1. Create optimized report variant 2. Limit default date range 3. Remove unnecessary ALV fields 4. Consider creating custom transaction with reduced dataset

short_description: Oracle WMS task dispatching not assigning tasks
detailed_description: Warehouse tasks created but not dispatched to operators. Pick operations manual.
root_cause: Task type rules not configured for new warehouse zone in WMS_RULES
remediation_steps: 1. Check WMS rule configuration 2. Add rules for new warehouse zone 3. Assign operator resources 4. Test task dispatch and confirm

short_description: IDOC processing queue blocked for material master
detailed_description: Inbound IDOCs for MATMAS stuck in status 64. Master data sync halted across systems.
root_cause: TRFC queue locked after transactional RFC failure during peak load
remediation_steps: 1. Check SM58 for stuck tRFC 2. Unlock TRFC queue in SMQ2 3. Reprocess failed IDOCs via BD87 4. Monitor IDOC status in WE05

short_description: Withholding tax not calculating on vendor invoices
detailed_description: MIRO not deducting withholding tax. Tax compliance at risk.
root_cause: Withholding tax type and code not assigned to vendor master after migration
remediation_steps: 1. Check vendor master FK03 WHT section 2. Update WHT type/code via FK02 3. Recalculate affected invoices 4. Verify with J1INCHLN report

short_description: Transport request stuck in import queue
detailed_description: Transport requests failing with return code 8. Development changes not reaching QA.
root_cause: Import queue locked by failed transport with data dictionary conflicts
remediation_steps: 1. Check STMS import queue 2. Analyze transport log for RC=8 3. Resolve DDIC conflicts 4. Unlock queue and reimport

short_description: Oracle Order Management booking failing with holds
detailed_description: Sales orders stuck with credit check hold. Customer deliveries delayed.
root_cause: Credit check rule using outdated credit limit from interface not synced
remediation_steps: 1. Check credit limits in AR 2. Update credit rules 3. Release holds on valid orders 4. Fix credit limit sync interface

short_description: Database locks on EKBE table during GR posting
detailed_description: Exclusive lock waits on EKBE causing MIGO timeouts during peak receiving hours.
root_cause: Concurrent goods receipts on same PO causing lock escalation on EKBE
remediation_steps: 1. Analyze SM12 lock entries 2. Implement GR scheduling per PO 3. Enable row-level locking 4. Stagger receiving windows

short_description: Rebate agreement settlement not processing
detailed_description: VBO1 rebate settlement generating zero accruals. Sales incentives not being tracked.
root_cause: Rebate condition type BO01 scale base not maintained for new product hierarchy
remediation_steps: 1. Check VBO3 agreement details 2. Maintain scale base in rebate condition 3. Run VBOF retroactive rebate adjustment 4. Verify accrual postings

short_description: Automatic clearing F.13 not matching open items
detailed_description: Automatic clearing failing to match invoice and payment line items. AR aging inflated.
root_cause: Clearing criteria in FBKP missing reference field for payment allocation
remediation_steps: 1. Review FBKP clearing rules 2. Add ZUONR to clearing criteria 3. Run F.13 test mode first 4. Execute clearing for affected company codes

short_description: RFC connections to satellite systems failing
detailed_description: RFC destinations returning COMMUNICATION_FAILURE. BW extraction and PI interfaces down.
root_cause: Gateway process overloaded with orphaned RFC connections not being released
remediation_steps: 1. Check SMGW gateway monitor 2. Kill orphaned connections 3. Increase gw/max_conn parameter 4. Implement RFC connection pooling

short_description: Oracle AP payment format generating invalid file
detailed_description: Payment file rejected by bank. ACH/EFT payments not transmitted.
root_cause: Payment format template not updated for new bank file specification
remediation_steps: 1. Check payment format in IBY 2. Update XSLT template 3. Regenerate payment file 4. Validate with bank test upload

short_description: Batch determination in VL02N not finding valid batches
detailed_description: Delivery processing not finding available batches despite stock availability.
root_cause: Batch search strategy condition records expired in transaction MBC1
remediation_steps: 1. Check batch search strategy in OMCE 2. Extend condition records in MBC1 3. Verify batch classification in MSC3N 4. Reprocess deliveries

short_description: Year-end balance carryforward taking excessive time
detailed_description: FAGLGVTR running for 18+ hours. Year-end close deadline at risk.
root_cause: All company codes being processed sequentially instead of parallel execution
remediation_steps: 1. Enable parallel processing in FAGLGVTR 2. Segment by company code groups 3. Schedule during low-activity window 4. Monitor via SM37

short_description: Credit memo request not triggering workflow approval
detailed_description: VA01 credit memo orders bypassing approval workflow. Revenue leakage risk.
root_cause: Workflow event linkage broken after support pack upgrade for credit order type
remediation_steps: 1. Check SWE2 event type linkage 2. Restore workflow trigger for credit memo 3. Test with SWDD 4. Process pending credit memos through workflow

short_description: Spool system overflow causing print failures
detailed_description: SP01 showing thousands of unprocessed spool requests. Output management paralyzed.
root_cause: Spool work processes hung due to printer connectivity issues over weekend
remediation_steps: 1. Check spool administration SP02 2. Delete obsolete spool requests 3. Restart spool work processes 4. Fix printer connectivity and test

short_description: Oracle GL posting subledger journal entries timeout
detailed_description: Subledger accounting program running indefinitely. Period close blocked.
root_cause: XLA_AE_LINES table bloated with 500M+ records without partition management
remediation_steps: 1. Implement table partitioning on XLA_AE_LINES 2. Archive old periods 3. Update statistics 4. Resubmit SLA accounting

short_description: Vendor evaluation scores not updating
detailed_description: ME61 showing stale vendor scores. Procurement decisions based on outdated data.
root_cause: Evaluation criteria weights reset to zero during customizing transport
remediation_steps: 1. Check ME62 evaluation criteria 2. Restore weights from test system 3. Run ME63 automatic evaluation 4. Verify scores across purchasing orgs

short_description: Dunning run F150 generating letters for cleared items
detailed_description: Customers receiving dunning notices for already-paid invoices. Customer complaints.
root_cause: Dunning date selection not excluding recently cleared items within grace period
remediation_steps: 1. Review F150 dunning parameters 2. Adjust clearing date consideration 3. Suppress notices for recently cleared items 4. Send apology communications

short_description: Availability check ATP taking 45 seconds per line item
detailed_description: CO09 availability check response times unacceptable. Order entry productivity crashed.
root_cause: ATP check scope including all MRP elements instead of confirmed quantities only
remediation_steps: 1. Review OVZG ATP check configuration 2. Restrict checking scope to confirmed receipts 3. Optimize ATP relevant tables 4. Enable ATP check caching

short_description: Oracle HRMS absence accrual plan not calculating
detailed_description: PTO accruals showing zero for new year. Employee absence balances incorrect.
root_cause: Accrual plan effective dates not rolled over for 2026 fiscal year
remediation_steps: 1. Update accrual plan dates 2. Run accrual process 3. Verify individual balances 4. Communicate corrected balances to employees

short_description: Purchase order print program extremely slow
detailed_description: ME9F mass output processing taking 4+ hours for monthly PO prints.
root_cause: Custom smartform loading vendor logo images from external URL for each PO
remediation_steps: 1. Cache vendor logos locally 2. Optimize smartform logic 3. Enable parallel output processing 4. Schedule during off-peak hours

short_description: SAP Web Dispatcher high response times for Fiori apps
detailed_description: Fiori launchpad loading in 30+ seconds. All Fiori-based operations impacted.
root_cause: Web Dispatcher connection pool exhausted due to non-released HTTP connections
remediation_steps: 1. Check ICM monitor in SMICM 2. Increase connection pool size 3. Configure keep-alive timeout 4. Restart ICM and Web Dispatcher
